title: Indiana assessed value rises 10% since 2025
description:
Gross assessed values for commercial, industrial and residential properties collectively rose nearly 10% across Indiana from 2025 to 2026 in the latest state data, less than the 19% jump recorded between 2024 and 2025.

description:

title: Comcast plans to split into two public companies by spinning off NBCUniversal and Sky
description:
Comcast is planning to split itself into two publicly traded companies, one focused on media that would include NBCUniversal and Sky and the other focused on broadband and wireless services.

title: Fort Wayne to benefit from Michelin manufacturing consolidation
description:

title: $1.9B Cummins joint venture facing indefinite pause
description:

description: The five-year agreement includes millions of dollars earmarked to expand access to homeownership, support small business growth, drive economic development, and strengthen financial stability throughout the bank's region

title: Attorney general secures charges in 8 Medicaid fraud cases in Indiana
description:
Indiana Attorney General Todd Rokita announced Friday that his office has taken legal action in several counties across the state for alleged Medicaid fraud in nursing homes.
